_comment: Ceramic dielectric-code extraction rules for MPNs without a plain EIA substring. Researched 2026-06-12. Taiyo Yuden codes verified per-part on TY-COMPAS (ds.yuden.co.jp); TDK JB via TDK's MLCC temp-characteristics guide + DigiKey product highlight; TDK disc codes via DigiKey per-part attributes (product.tdk.com timed out); Murata via Cat.No.C02E numbering doc; KEMET/AVX via their dielectric datasheets. Project convention: Y5V/F -> ceramic-class-2 (flagged), Z5U/E -> ceramic-class-3.

rules.format: new global PN (post-2022, 20 chars, e.g. MSASP063EB5475MFNA01); temperature code at chars 10-11
rules.source: https://ds.yuden.co.jp/TYCOMPAS/or/detail?pn=MSASP063EB5475MFNA01&u=M (B5=X5R) + per-code TY-COMPAS lookups (CG/B7/C6/C7/D7); SD = CFCAP low-distortion series, class-2-grade limits per TY catalog mirror https://www.modelithics.com/models/Vendor/Taiyo_Yuden/UMK105.pdf
rules.note: MSAS is NOT a Mouser prefix — it is TY's new global numbering (M + market category S/C/A/B/M/L + series). Class-1 codes CH/CK confirmed in live TAS data at the same chars-10-11 slot as the TY-COMPAS-verified CG/B5 parts (sub-pF RF caps MSART042SCH0R2AWRA01, MCASL042SCK0R2AWNA01); CJ/UJ/UK/SL/RH carried from the TY catalog table (inferred, verify on first hit).

rules.format: legacy PN (e.g. JMK212BC6476MG-T, TMK316AB7106KL): 2-letter temp code after the 3-digit size (skip at most one grade letter)
rules.source: TY catalog mirror https://www.modelithics.com/models/Vendor/Taiyo_Yuden/UMK105.pdf (full class-1 ppm table + class-2 table); TY-COMPAS legacy<->new equivalences
rules.note: FLAG: legacy 'F' = JIS F (+30/-80%) = EIA Y5V; mapped class-2 per project convention — review if class-3 preferred.

rules.format: C/CGA/CGB/CKC chip series: temp characteristic literally after series+size (C0402JB0G103K020BC -> JB)
rules.source: TDK MLCC temp-characteristics guide (JB = JIS class-2 B, +/-10% -25..+85C); https://www.digikey.com/en/product-highlight/t/tdk/ch-jb-temp-coefficient-caps; canonical https://product.tdk.com/en/contact/faq/capacitors-0051.html

rules.format: leaded disc CC/CD/CK/CS series: code after series+size(+Z)(-): CD10-E2GA152MYGS -> E; CC45SL3AD100JYGN -> SL
rules.source: DigiKey per-part TDK attributes (CS14-F2GA103MYNKA = F; CD10-E2GA152MYNS = E; CK45-B3AD101KYNNA = B; CS11ZU2GA472MYGKA = Z5U); TDK leaded-disc product guide leaddisc_product_guide_en.pdf
rules.note: FLAGS: E (JIS +20/-55%) -> class-3; ZU = Z5U -> class-3; F (JIS +30/-80%, Y5V-like) -> class-2 per convention but least stable — review.

rules.format: GRM/GRT/GCM etc: 2-char temp code at chars 7-8 (GRM155R71H221KA01D -> R7)
rules.source: Murata Cat.No.C02E numbering doc https://media.digikey.com/pdf/Data%20Sheets/Murata%20PDFs/Chip%20Monolithic%20Ceramic%20Caps%20Part%20Numbering.pdf; C7=X7S and C8=X6S verified per-part on DigiKey
rules.note: D7=X7T inferred (no sample); E4/F1/F5 flags as above.

rules.format: SMD MLCC: dielectric letter after voltage code (C0603C102K3GACTU -> G)
rules.note: Only G/R mapped (only ones in dataset). KEMET also uses P=X5R, H=X8R — extend only with the matching datasheet.

rules.format: standard SMD MLCC: dielectric letter at char 6 (06035A820JAT2A -> A)
rules.note: Only A/C mapped. AVX also uses D=X5R, F=Y5V, Z=Z5U — extend only with the matching datasheet.
